lastReleaseMessage: Dashboard + backlog reconciled to reality; maintenance pass. Confirmed M1 survival loop already shipped (waves, oil-zero fail, fog, save/load, win/lose, convoy) and marked DONE; corrected stale gates; cut not-on-us rows (Navy art, Discord URL, superseded auto-worker slider); dashboard counts only active-milestone open rows; untracked *.ps1.bak, deleted orphan source/world stubs, fixed building.gd header, recorded Spine version lock + scoped macOS/Linux out, started OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md; br-bp items tracked in the adherence doc.

barRaise.topFinding: Action list cleared 2026-06-23: the M1 survival mechanics (waves+SP scaling, oil-zero fail, fog, save/load, Hold-the-Wall win/lose) were confirmed already shipped and the stale 40%/not-started gates corrected; maintenance done (.ps1.bak untracked, orphan source/world stubs deleted, building.gd header fixed); macOS/Linux Spine scoped out by owner + version lock recorded. Remaining opens are Navy art (off-dashboard) and an optional peak-wave profile.

actions.title: git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (makes the v0.57.8 gitignored claim true) and correct the building.gd header version refs (v0.67.0 / v0.61.14 vs a v0.59.3 repo).
Source or build the macOS and Linux Spine GDExtension payloads (or document the gap as a known M4 blocker) and record the Godot-4.6.2 / Spine-4.3.17 version lock in docs/SPINE_INTEGRATION.md.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall or between-mission save/load); M1 held at 40% for thirteen days while effort went to art and infrastructure.
Get Navy's on-screen-size Spine re-export for the rifleman; it renders at native rig size and the check_no_scale_constants gate blocks the in-engine workaround.
Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); ninth audit running, the durable closer for the footer and bare-message classes.
Rewrite the bare CHANGELOG band v0.58.25-v0.58.42 to describe its work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05840-2026-06-18.
